label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, this is a question about causation and intent. Let's break down the scenario step-by-step to understand how a typical person would answer whether Brown intentionally rolled a six. Scenario summary: 1. Brown wants to kill Smith. 2. Smith is in another building where there's a bomb. 3. Brown can detonate the bomb only by producing a six-dotted image on a camera lens in his room. 4. Brown takes a normal, fair, six-sided die and tosses it onto a table in his room. 5. If the die lands six-up, it produces a six-dotted image on the camera lens. 6. This image then detonates the bomb, killing Smith. 7.
